reviews.text: The villa is absolutely stunning! The pool area is perfect for relaxing, and the beach is just a short walk away. Emmanuel was a fantastic host.
Great location and beautiful architecture. The solar backup was a lifesaver during the power cuts. Highly recommend!
We had a wonderful stay. The kitchen is fully equipped and the staff were very helpful. A bit of noise from the road but otherwise perfect.
A true gem in Diani. The photos don't do it justice. Will definitely be back!
